For your listening pleasure, XM brings you Caricia (XM 93), a new channel featuring Spanish-language oldies hits from the 60s, 70s and 80s. Caricia will feature timeless music from popular legendary artists, including: Julio Iglesias, Jose Feliciano, Roberto Carlos, Leo Dan, Jose Jose, Leonardo Favio, Armando Manzanero, Nino Bravo, Camilo Sesto and more. In addition to XM Radio, Caricia is also available on XM Radio Online. Programming and additional information for the channel are available online at Caricia.

XM is proud to welcome two new universal sound systems to its family of accessories. Designed to deliver dynamic sound for listening to XM in the home, office, and beyond, the XM Sound System and XM Compact Sound System offer crisp acoustics and are the perfect complements to your XM receiver. For more information about availability and pricing, please visit xmradio.com/xmsoundsystem and xmradio.com/xmcompactsoundsystem.
